framework.name: Five Families of Agent Challenges (TU Delft/JetBrains)
framework.description: Empirical study of 3,191 SO questions + 64,098 GitHub issues across 18 agent repos identifies five challenge families: (1) environment/deps, (2) retrieval/memory, (3) orchestration/execution control, (4) model-tool interaction contracts, (5) runtime reliability. Orchestration and retrieval are the HARDEST and LEAST VISIBLE — they persist as maintenance burdens while install/prompting issues get resolved quickly.
framework.raw_quote: retrieval- and orchestration-related challenges are less visible, more complex, and tend to persist as ongoing maintenance burdens on GitHub

source.title: What Challenges Do Developers Face in AI Agent Systems? An Empirical ...
